name: HYDRA
description: 402-native regulatory intelligence API for autonomous agents. 55+ paid endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2. Real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: FRED (28 economic series), BLS, Treasury, SEC EDGAR, Federal Register, FDIC BankFind, Congress.gov, Fed RSS, Kalshi KXFED, Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, Google DNS-over-HTTPS, CoinGecko. Market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities (60% KXFED / 40% model blend), FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing. Tier 1 government + Tier 3 CFTC-regulated data only.

skills.name: Web Extraction
skills.description: Structured web extraction — title, headings, clean text, links, metadata from any URL. $0.01 USDC.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Web search with structured result extraction. $0.02 USDC.

skills.name: Prediction Market Signals
skills.description: Bulk scored signals for all active regulatory prediction markets — HYDRA probability, impact scoring, signal direction. Data from Polymarket Gamma, Polymarket CLOB, and Kalshi KXFED. CFTC-regulated sources only. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Get signals for all regulatory prediction markets

skills.name: Alpha Report
skills.description: Premium alpha report — edge vs market price, Kelly sizing, entry price, historical analogues, resolution timeline. Calibrated with Kalshi KXFED market data. $10.00 USDC.
examples: Alpha report for Fed rate decision market

skills.name: FOMC Pre-Decision Signal
skills.description: Pre-FOMC rate probabilities with Kalshi KXFED market calibration (60% market / 40% model blend), speech analysis, dot plot tracking. $5.00 USDC.
examples: Rate probabilities for next FOMC meeting

skills.name: FOMC Decision Classification
skills.description: Real-time FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds of release. Market-calibrated rate probabilities, vote breakdown, statement analysis. $25.00 USDC.
examples: Classify the latest FOMC rate decision

skills.description: Atomic real-time economic data from FRED (28 series), BLS, Treasury yields, FDIC bank failures, Federal Register rulemakings. All Tier 1 government sources. $0.50 USDC.
examples: Get current CPI, unemployment, GDP, yield curve
